\centry{Nationwide Insurance}{Data Analytics Intern}{Columbus, OH}{June 2017 -- August 2017}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Analyzed claims frequency and severity trends across four product lines using SAS and Excel, presenting findings to a team of 12 actuaries and business analysts
  \item Designed an interactive Excel dashboard tracking regional loss ratios that was adopted by the Property Analytics team for ongoing monthly reporting
  \item Completed coursework in actuarial fundamentals and presented a capstone project on predictive modeling for auto insurance pricing to senior leadership
\end{itemize}
